assessmentObjectives.description: Understand and respond to spoken language
Understand and respond to written language
Interact and communicate effectively in speech

topics.name: Describing Yourself and Others
topics.description: Name, age, personality, appearance; adjectives endings; physical and character descriptions

topics.name: Family and Friends
topics.description: Family members, relationships, getting on with others; possessive adjectives (mein, dein); reflexive verbs

topics.name: Marriage and Partnerships
topics.description: Relationships, marriage, partnerships; opinions on relationships; future tense plans

topics.name: Food, Diet and Healthy Eating
topics.description: Meals, food vocabulary, healthy eating; German food culture; opinions on diet and lifestyle

topics.name: Sport and Exercise
topics.description: Sports, fitness, exercise routines; advantages of sport; gern/lieber/am liebsten

topics.name: Health, Illness and Wellbeing
topics.description: Parts of the body, illnesses, at the doctor/pharmacy; health advice; modal verbs

topics.name: Smoking, Drugs and Alcohol
topics.description: Dangers of smoking, drugs and alcohol; opinions; man soll/man darf nicht; healthy choices

topics.name: School Life and Subjects
topics.description: School subjects, timetable, opinions on subjects; the German school system; comparisons

topics.name: School Rules and Uniform
topics.description: School rules, uniform, facilities; man muss / man darf; expressing obligation and permission

topics.name: Future Plans and Careers
topics.description: Jobs, careers, further study; future plans; conditional (ich möchte); applications and work experience

topics.name: Hobbies and Interests
topics.description: Leisure activities, reading, music, films; hobbies in different tenses; opinions and reasons

topics.name: Technology in Everyday Life
topics.description: Social media, internet, smartphones; advantages and dangers; opinions on technology use

topics.name: Going Out and Entertainment
topics.description: Cinema, concerts, restaurants; inviting friends; arranging to go out; accepting and declining

topics.name: German Traditions and Festivals
topics.description: Oktoberfest, Weihnachten, Karneval, Ostern, Tag der Deutschen Einheit; German cultural traditions

topics.name: German-Speaking Culture
topics.description: Culture in German-speaking countries; food, music, art; DACH region; cultural diversity

topics.name: Food and Drink Culture
topics.description: German cuisine, meals, regional specialities; at the café/restaurant; ordering food; typical dishes

topics.name: Famous German-Speaking People
topics.description: Famous German-speaking figures; sport, music, film stars; describing achievements; role models

topics.name: The Influence of Celebrities
topics.description: Impact of celebrity culture; social media influencers; positive and negative influences; opinions

topics.name: Holidays and Travel
topics.description: Holiday destinations, travel by train/plane/car; accommodation; the perfect tense for past holidays

topics.name: Places of Interest in Germany
topics.description: Berlin, Munich, regions of Germany, tourist attractions; describing towns; visiting German-speaking countries

topics.name: At the Hotel and Tourist Information
topics.description: Booking accommodation, asking for information, dealing with problems; hotel vocabulary; role-plays

topics.name: Television, Film and Music
topics.description: TV programmes, films, music genres; opinions and justifications; comparing media; German media

topics.name: The Internet and Social Media
topics.description: Online activities, social networks, cyberbullying; advantages and risks; internet safety

strands.name: Theme 3.3: The Environment and Where People Live

topics.name: Your Local Area
topics.description: Describing your town/region; what there is to do; facilities; advantages and disadvantages of where you live

topics.name: Environmental Problems and Solutions
topics.description: Pollution, recycling, climate change; environmental vocabulary; man muss/sollte; solutions

topics.name: Charity and Voluntary Work
topics.description: Volunteering, helping others, charity organisations; imperfect tense; community projects

topics.name: Tenses: Present, Perfect and Imperfect
topics.description: Forming and using the present, perfect (Perfekt) and imperfect (Präteritum) tenses; when to use each

topics.name: Tenses: Future and Conditional
topics.description: The future (werden + infinitive), conditional (würde + infinitive); expressing plans and wishes

topics.name: Cases: Nominative, Accusative, Dative and Genitive
topics.description: The four German cases; when to use each; definite and indefinite articles in all cases; prepositions taking specific cases

topics.name: Word Order and Conjunctions
topics.description: Main clause word order; subordinate clauses (verb to end); coordinating vs subordinating conjunctions; dass, weil, wenn, obwohl

topics.name: Adjective Endings and Pronouns
topics.description: Adjective endings after der/die/das and ein/eine; possessive adjectives; personal and relative pronouns

topics.name: Separable and Modal Verbs
topics.description: Separable verb prefixes (an-, aus-, mit-, zu-); modal verbs (können, müssen, dürfen, sollen, wollen, möchten); word order with modals
